zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Elizabeth Magby於大約1834年出生在美國阿拉巴馬州沃克時，她的父親John Alexander Magby22歲，母親Francis C Sullivan20歲。她於1851年9月15日與General Richard Marion Hughes在美國阿肯色州克拉克結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1880年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇且於1910年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥。她去世於1887年8月3日在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Elizabeth Magby于大约1834年出生在美国亚拉巴马州沃克时，她的父亲John Alexander Magby22岁，母亲Francis C Sullivan20岁。她于1851年9月15日与General Richard Marion Hughes在美国阿肯色州克拉克结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1880年住在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇且于1910年住在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥。她去世于1887年8月3日在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Magby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McBee
meanings: Scottish: variant of McBay , itself a shortened form of McBeth . In Gaelic, -th- is silent.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
Historical Boundaries - 1847: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States
Historical Boundaries -  1859: Clark, Arkansas, United States 1873: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States
Arkansas supplied an estimated 50,000 men to the Confederate Army andabout 15,000 to the Union Army.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Skirmish at Benton
historicEvents.description: Confederate forces in Arkansas began an invasion of Missouri, while other Confederate sources probed the line around Little Rock. On July  6, 1864 the fourth Arkansas Cavalry tried to break the line around Little Rock one soldier was killed, eight were wounded, three went missing from the Union side and four were killed and six wounded from the Confederate side.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Encyclopedia of Arkansas History & Culture-Skirmish at Benton

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.

historicEvents.title: The Mosaic Templar is Founded
historicEvents.description: The Mosaic Templar is an African American fraternal organization founded in Little Rock. it was founded by former slaves, John Edward Bush and Chester W. Keatts. It was part of a movement that was going on at the time, where everyone was forming fraternities and sororities. The main departments for this one where endowment, monument, analysis, uniform, rank, recapitulation, records, and a juvenile division.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Encyclopedia of Arkansas History & Culture- Mosaic Templars of America

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Elizabeth Magby was born about 1834, in Walker, Alabama, United States, her father, John Alexander Magby, was 22 and her mother, Francis C Sullivan, was 20. She married General Richard Marion Hughes on 15 September 1851, in Clark, Arkansas, United States. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1880 and Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1910. She died on 3 August 1887, in Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Elizabeth Magby est née environ 1834, à Walker, Alabama, États-Unis, son père, John Alexander Magby, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Francis C Sullivan, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé General Richard Marion Hughes le 15 septembre 1851, à Clark, Arkansas, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1880 et à Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1910. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1887, à Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Elizabeth Magby um 1834 in Walker, Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Alexander Magby 22 und ihre Mutter Francis C Sullivan 20. Sie hat am 15. September 1851 in Clark, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten General Richard Marion Hughes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1880 hat sie in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und 1910 in Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 3. August 1887 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Elizabeth Magby è nata il circa 1834 nel Walker, Alabama, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Alexander Magby, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Francis C Sullivan, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato General Richard Marion Hughes il 15 settembre 1851, nel Clark, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880 e nel Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1910. Morì il 3 agosto 1887, nel Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Elizabeth Magbyが約1834年にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州ウォーカーで生まれた時，父John Alexander Magbyは22歳，母Francis C Sullivanは20歳であった。1851年9月15日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州クラークでGeneral Richard Marion Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングド ロチェに，1910年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビスマルックに住んでいた。彼女は1887年8月3日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Elizabeth Magby(이)가 대략 1834년 미국 앨라배마 주 워커에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Alexander Magby(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Francis C Sullivan(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1851년 9월 15일 미국 아칸소 주 클라르크에서 General Richard Marion Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1880년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 데 록헤에서, 1910년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 비스마c크에서 살았다. 그녀는 1887년 8월 3일 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Elizabeth Magby nasceu aproximadamente 1834, em Walker, Alabama, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Alexander Magby, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Francis C Sullivan, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com General Richard Marion Hughes em 15 de setembro de 1851, em Clark, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em De Roche, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1880 e em Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1910. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1887, em Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Elizabeth Magby родилась около 1834 г. в местности валкир, Алабама, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Alexander Magby было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Francis C Sullivan, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени General Richard Marion Hughes 15 сентября 1851 г. в местности кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности де рош, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году и в местности бисмаркк, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1910 году. Она умерла 3 августа 1887 г. в местности хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Elizabeth Magby nació aproximadamente 1834, en Walker, Alabama, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Alexander Magby, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Francis C Sullivan, tenía 20 años. Se casó con General Richard Marion Hughes el 15 de septiembre de 1851, en Clark, Arkansas, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1880 y en Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1910. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1887, en Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 54 años.
